name: ai-project-portfolio
description: Portfolio repository for AI-assisted applications, product demos, and prompt workflows.

scripts.build:all: npm run build --workspace apps/astra && npm run build --workspace apps/nexus-play && npm run build --workspace apps/layerforge-studio
scripts.lint:apps: npm run lint --workspace apps/astra && npm run lint --workspace apps/nexus-play && npm run lint --workspace apps/layerforge-studio
